message:
test(fwc): expand truthfulness invariant and error taxonomy test coverage (bead 29.8.4)

Comprehensive test-only expansion covering the truthfulness contract
invariants and error classification system with snapshot pinning and
cross-invariant validation.

catalog.rs (+632 lines, all in mod tests):
- DiscoveryDataSource invariants: tags unique, authoritative/offline
  mutual exclusion, freshness caveats non-empty on stale sources
- DiscoveryProvenance invariants: authoritative matches source kind,
  caveat matches freshness, command name preserved through serde
- RuntimeMode invariants: is_authoritative/is_offline/is_refused are
  mutually exclusive, provenance marker implies offline, degradation
  warning only on DegradedOffline
- CommandClassification cross-invariants: offline commands unaffected
  by host absence, never require tokens/approval; local-only never
  requires host; capability-token implies LiveHost; approval implies
  capability
- expected_discovery_source: live returns authoritative, refused returns
  None, offline returns offline source, non-discovery returns None
- Snapshot pinning: WorkflowKind, SimulateCapability, HostAbsentBehavior,
  ToolAvailability serde tags
- Auth-truth, transcript/evidence, intent action, export/admin command
  set membership invariants
- COMMANDS/EXPORT_COMMANDS/ADMIN_COMMANDS exhaustive membership checks

error_taxonomy.rs (+371 lines, all in mod tests):
- All error codes start with FCP_ERR_, are unique, map to non-empty
  category
- All categories have at least one code
- Exit codes in valid range (<=128)
- Recovery actions non-empty; commands mention "fwc" when present
- RateLimit/Transport codes retryable; Validation/Parse codes not
- StructuredError stable JSON key presence and round-trip
- Per-variant classify_fcp_error tests for ~8 specific error kinds
- External error retryability: taxonomy overrides original flag
- Category tag format pinning
- ERROR_CODE_COUNT validation
- Exit code pinning by category group
- StructuredError without details omits details key

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
